name.en: Siam Road Charcoal Char Kuey Teow
name.ms: Char Kuey Teow Arang Jalan Siam

description.en: Uncle Tan's legendary pushcart stall cooking Char Kuey Teow over blazing charcoal since the 1960s. Once ranked 14th at the World Street Food Congress. The wok hei aroma is unmistakable.
description.ms: Gerai pushcart legenda Pakcik Tan memasak Char Kuey Teow di atas arang menyala sejak tahun 1960-an.

address.ms: 82 Jalan Siam, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Queue can be over an hour - worth it
May close early when sold out
Cash only - about RM8 per plate

description.en: Three generations of the Yeow family have been serving this breakfast staple for over 50 years from Star Hotel Coffee Shop. A hidden gem among the more famous char kuey teow spots.
description.ms: Tiga generasi keluarga Yeow telah menghidangkan sarapan ini selama lebih 50 tahun dari Kedai Kopi Star Hotel.

address.en: Star Hotel Coffee Shop, 246 Lebuh Carnarvon, George Town, Penang
address.ms: Kedai Kopi Star Hotel, 246 Lebuh Carnarvon, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: 50+ year old family recipe
Less famous but locals prefer it
Morning only - they close by noon

name.en: Ming Qing Charcoal Duck Egg Char Koay Teow
name.ms: Ming Qing Char Koay Teow Telur Itik Arang

description.en: The only Penang char koay teow listed in the MICHELIN Bib Gourmand guide. Famous for the addition of a duck egg sunny side up on top. Night stall only.
description.ms: Satu-satunya char koay teow Pulau Pinang yang tersenarai dalam panduan MICHELIN Bib Gourmand.

address.ms: Lorong Macalister, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Closed on Mondays
Get the duck egg sunny side up version
Only Penang CKT with MICHELIN recognition

description.en: Penang's most popular street hawker strip that comes alive after sunset. Dozens of stalls serving char kuey teow, lok lok, satay, oyster omelette, and more along the bustling road.
description.ms: Jalanan penjaja paling popular Pulau Pinang yang meriah selepas matahari terbenam.

address.en: Lorong Baru (New Lane), George Town, Penang
address.ms: Lorong Baru, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Best after sunset when all stalls are open
Try the lok lok (skewer hotpot)
Bring cash - most stalls don't take cards

description.en: Iconic seaside hawker center serving Penang's greatest hits - char kuey teow, assam laksa, Hokkien mee, pasembur, and cendol. Sea breeze dining with views across the strait.
description.ms: Pusat penjaja tepi laut ikonik menghidangkan hidangan terbaik Pulau Pinang.

address.ms: Persiaran Gurney, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Try the assam laksa - Penang's other famous dish
Get cendol for dessert
More tourist-friendly than New Lane but still excellent

description.en: UNESCO-listed Chinese clan settlements built on stilts over the water since the 19th century. The Chew Jetty is the largest, but the Lee and Tan jetties are less crowded and more authentic.
description.ms: Penempatan klan Cina yang tersenarai UNESCO dibina di atas air sejak abad ke-19.

address.ms: Pengkalan Weld, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Chew Jetty is busiest - try Lee or Tan jetty instead
Families still live here - be respectful
Beautiful sunset photos from the end of the jetty

description.en: Former bus depot transformed into George Town's coolest creative hub. Street art, independent galleries, artisan cafes, and weekend markets. The epicenter of Penang's contemporary art scene.
description.ms: Bekas depot bas yang diubah menjadi hab kreatif paling keren George Town.

address.ms: 31A Jalan Gurdwara, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Weekend farmers market is excellent
Check their events page for exhibitions
Great coffee at the on-site cafe

name.en: Penang Road Famous Jin Kor Char Kuey Teow
name.ms: Char Kuey Teow Jin Kor Jalan Penang

description.en: MICHELIN Bib Gourmand stall inside the always-busy Joo Hooi Kopitiam. A well-balanced, reliable plate of char kuey teow right in the heart of George Town's heritage zone.
description.ms: Gerai Bib Gourmand MICHELIN di dalam Joo Hooi Kopitiam yang sentiasa sibuk.

address.en: Joo Hooi Kopitiam, 475 Jalan Penang, George Town, Penang
address.ms: Joo Hooi Kopitiam, 475 Jalan Penang, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Inside Joo Hooi Kopitiam - heritage coffee shop
MICHELIN Bib Gourmand recognized
Great central location for food crawl

description.en: One of the world's most unusual temples where live pit vipers drape freely over altars and incense burners. Built in 1850, the smoke from the incense keeps the snakes docile.
description.ms: Salah satu kuil paling luar biasa di dunia di mana ular berbisa hidup melingkar bebas di atas altar.

address.en: Jalan Tokong Ular, Bayan Lepas, Penang
address.ms: Jalan Tokong Ular, Bayan Lepas, Pulau Pinang

tips: Real snakes roam freely - don't touch them
Incense smoke keeps them calm
Photo with a snake available for a donation

description.en: Southeast Asia's largest Buddhist temple complex perched on a hillside in Air Itam. The 36-meter bronze Guanyin statue and seven-story pagoda with Chinese, Thai, and Burmese tiers.
description.ms: Kompleks kuil Buddha terbesar di Asia Tenggara terletak di lereng bukit di Air Itam.

tips: Take the inclined lift to the Guanyin statue
Spectacular during Chinese New Year with lanterns
Stop for assam laksa at the base of the hill

description.en: The most famous assam laksa stall in Penang, consistently rated number one. Sour, spicy, fishy broth with thick rice noodles that exemplifies Penang's signature noodle dish.
description.ms: Gerai asam laksa paling terkenal di Pulau Pinang, sentiasa dinilai nombor satu.

address.ms: 1 Jalan Pasar, Air Itam, Pulau Pinang

tips: Combine with a visit to Kek Lok Si nearby
Only RM4-5 per bowl
They close when sold out

description.en: World-famous collection of murals by Lithuanian artist Ernest Zacharevic blending painted art with real objects. 'Children on a Bicycle' and 'Boy on a Bike' are the most photographed spots.
description.ms: Koleksi mural terkenal dunia oleh artis Lithuania Ernest Zacharevic yang menggabungkan seni lukis dengan objek sebenar.

address.en: Armenian Street Area, George Town, Penang
address.ms: Kawasan Lebuh Armenian, George Town, Pulau Pinang

spots.best_time: Early morning for photos without crowds
tips: Download the street art map from tourism office
Early morning means no crowds at popular murals
Explore side streets for newer pieces

description.en: Stunning 19th-century mansion showcasing the opulent lifestyle of Straits Chinese Peranakan culture. Over 1,000 antiques across jade, porcelain, and gold-threaded textiles.
description.ms: Rumah agam abad ke-19 yang menakjubkan mempamerkan gaya hidup mewah budaya Peranakan Cina Selat.

address.ms: 29 Lebuh Gereja, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Allow at least 1 hour to explore
Over 1,000 antiques on display
Great for understanding Peranakan culture

description.en: Bustling evening hawker stretch along one of George Town's oldest streets. Choose duck egg char kuey teow, oyster omelette, and dozens of other dishes cooked to order on the sidewalk.
description.ms: Deretan penjaja petang yang meriah di salah satu jalan tertua George Town.

address.ms: Lebuh Chulia, George Town, Pulau Pinang

tips: Choose duck egg CKT for richer flavor
Less touristy than New Lane
Great for bar hopping after eating

description.en: Award-winning botanical garden along the coast at Batu Ferringhi with over 500 tropical plant species. Guided spice tours, cooking classes, and a treetop walk through the canopy.
description.ms: Taman botani pemenang anugerah di pesisir pantai Batu Ferringhi dengan lebih 500 spesies tumbuhan tropika.

address.en: Lone Crag Villa, Jalan Teluk Bahang, Batu Ferringhi, Penang
address.ms: Lone Crag Villa, Jalan Teluk Bahang, Batu Ferringhi, Pulau Pinang

tips: Book a cooking class in advance
Guided tours explain the spice history
Cafe has excellent views

description.en: Southeast Asia's largest butterfly garden with over 15,000 free-flying butterflies in a naturalistic indoor habitat. Interactive exhibits on insect life and metamorphosis.
description.ms: Taman rama-rama terbesar Asia Tenggara dengan lebih 15,000 rama-rama terbang bebas dalam habitat dalaman naturalistik.

address.en: No 830, Jalan Teluk Bahang, Batu Ferringhi, Penang
address.ms: No 830, Jalan Teluk Bahang, Batu Ferringhi, Pulau Pinang

tips: Best on sunny days when butterflies are most active
Great for families with kids
Combine with Tropical Spice Garden nearby
